title: Supply Chain Manager - Omni Logistics India - Experienced Professionals

jsonLd.title: Supply Chain Manager - Omni Logistics India - Experienced Professionals
jsonLd.description:
Omni Logistics India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Supply Chain Manager at our Pune location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Omni Logistics India:
Omni Logistics India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Life and accident insurance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Pune, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omni Logistics India!
